criteria.check: File holds only validated conclusions; no raw reasoning or tool dumps.
Exactly the four sections Hypotheses/Decisions/Findings/Open, identical across sessions.
Read once at bootstrap, referenced after; no per-turn re-read.
Writes upsert by stable key; no full-file rewrite; contradictions replaced + logged in Decisions.
State reconstructs from the file alone after /compact and reset.
If multiple writers, last-upsert-by-key-wins or a lock; no blind text merge.
Path is stable and repo-relative; no .. escape.
JSON design report passes scripts/check.sh against assets/ contracts.

governance: Harness voice; evidence tags; single brand JM Labs; no invented prices; no client PII; never green without evidence.
